summary: Full backend + frontend testing completed for the Social Downloader Expo app. All 12 pytest backend API tests pass (100%) covering /api/download/process, /save, /list, /{id} delete, platform detection for YouTube/Instagram/TikTok/Twitter(x.com)/Facebook/Reddit, invalid-URL 400s, and MongoDB _id exclusion. Frontend Playwright tests on mobile viewport (390x844) also 100% pass: Download tab loads, smart-clipboard badge, paste button, URL validation gates submit (disabled empty/invalid, enabled for valid http(s)), modal progresses parsing -> downloading -> success, Gallery tab shows persisted item, Profile shows Social Pro + Coming Soon + 3 feature rows each marked '(coming soon)' with no pricing/purchase text.

issues: PLACEHOLDER_THUMBS in backend server.py map each platform to a generic Unsplash photo, but the images are not visually related to the labeled platform (e.g. a YouTube-labeled card can render an Instagram-looking icon image). This is by design per PRD (simulated metadata) but looks confusing end-to-end. Consider using per-platform logo assets or a neutral gradient placeholder keyed by platform name.

react_native_issues.issue: Uses TouchableWithoutFeedback which is deprecated on web and logs warnings. Non-blocking; consider Pressable.
'shadow*' style props are deprecated (warning). Non-blocking; migrate to boxShadow where needed.
'useNativeDriver is not supported' warning on web preview only — expected on web, works correctly on native.

action_items: Optional polish: map PLACEHOLDER_THUMBS to per-platform-appropriate placeholder images or gradient/SVG thumbnails so the gallery card visuals match the platform label.
Optional: replace TouchableWithoutFeedback with Pressable in app/(tabs)/index.tsx to remove deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses BaseModel with .dict() — works with Pydantic v1 or v2-compat shim; if upgrading Pydantic v2, prefer .model_dump().
MongoDB _id is correctly excluded from GET list (projection {_id: 0}). Verified in test_save_and_list.
HTTP status codes appropriate: 400 for invalid URLs, 200 for CRUD ops, 200 with deleted=0 for non-existent delete (consider 404 if stricter semantics desired).
Environment variables used correctly (MONGO_URL, DB_NAME, EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL); no hardcoded URLs.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all listed flows: tab render, validation, modal stages, gallery persistence, profile Pro Coming Soon)

seed_data_creation: A TEST_ prefixed download was created via /api/download/save to verify list+delete, then cleaned up in test_delete_persisted. No residual test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend MongoDB at mongodb://localhost:27017/test_database. Frontend served at EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://downloader-refine.preview.emergentagent.com. Mobile viewport 390x844 recommended. Smart-clipboard auto-trigger cannot be verified on web (browser permission); manual paste + Download button flow is what covers the download path. The backend simulates metadata and the client animates progress — no real file is downloaded, per PRD.
rca_of_issue: No issues found that required RCA. All listed features work as specified.
